ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-10-2024 Continued To Feb-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Dec-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lori T. Suzuki, via Zoom, for and with Jordan Goldstein, Petitioner.

At the query of the court, Ms. Suzuki and Ms. Goldstein offer advocacy on behalf of the instant petition and confirm their efforts to locate Decedent's original will. Ms. Suzuki advises that she drafted the original will which explains how she obtained a copy of the will. After discussion regarding the presumption of revocation and mentions the supplemental declarations filed. the court confirms that there are no appearances to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The lost will dated Mar-12-2010 is admitted to probate. Jordan Goldstein is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $786,000. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jan-10-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
